I don’t want to be judged or compared, and honestly, I’m not sure I have anything interesting to share. So, it’s easier to just avoid it all. Sometimes I feel like I can share little things, like when I’m having a rough day, but I still hold back on the deeper stuff. They listened and shared some of their own struggles, and it felt nice to connect on that level. It was like a little reminder that I’m not alone in this. But then, I also think about the times when I’ve tried to share and it didn’t go as well, like when I felt brushed off or like my concerns were minimized. Those moments stick with me, you know? It’s hard to shake off that fear of being dismissed, especially when I’m already feeling vulnerable.
